name: prompt registry validator accepts an entry with id and a versions array per the section 2.10 schema
command:
printf 'prompts:
  - id: x
    versions:
      - version: 1.0.0
        file: prompts/x/v1.0.0.md
        hash: abc
        created: 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z
        eval_pass_rate: 0.9
        regression_from_prior: 0.0
        status: active
' > prompts/registry.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/prompts/validate-registry.sh" --registry prompts/registry.yaml 2>out.txt && grep -q 'valid=true' out.txt && grep -q 'prompts_count=1' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
